d4m_e1_team_creativity.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e1_team_creativity.text: Day 4, and your team is on fire! High morale is infectious — customers feel it the moment they walk in. A team this motivated can achieve anything.

d4m_e1_creativity_b.speaker: Staff
d4m_e1_creativity_b.text: Boss! We have an idea. The team wants to create a signature service package together — something that represents our laundromat's culture. Can we try it today?

choices.text: Give them full creative freedom
Guide the process with some direction
Let them develop it but review before launch
Too risky today — stick to what works

d4m_e1_freedom.speaker: Staff
d4m_e1_freedom.text: We created something incredible! Customers are already asking about our 'Premium Care Package.' This could be our most popular service ever!

d4m_e1_guide.speaker: Staff
d4m_e1_guide.text: Your input made it even better. The combination of our creativity and your experience produced something really special.

d4m_e1_review.speaker: Staff
d4m_e1_review.text: Your feedback refined it perfectly. It launched to an amazing response!

d4m_e1_decline.speaker: Staff
d4m_e1_decline.text: We understand, but we're a little deflated. We had real energy behind this idea.

d4m_e1_result_freedom.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e1_result_freedom.text: High-morale teams given ownership produce remarkable results. Trust your people when they're motivated — it multiplies their energy.

d4m_e1_result_guide.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e1_result_guide.text: Collaborative leadership — guiding without controlling — produces the best of both worlds. Your experience and their creativity are stronger together.

d4m_e1_result_review.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e1_result_review.text: Quality control without stifling creativity is excellent leadership. Balancing empowerment with standards is a difficult skill you managed well.

d4m_e1_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e1_result_decline.text: Caution has its place, but dismissing motivated team initiatives dampens the very energy that drives your business forward. High morale is fragile — protect it.

d4m_e2_acquisition_offer.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e2_acquisition_offer.text: Your motivated team has attracted attention. A larger company wants to acquire your laundromat outright. The offer is generous, but the decision is life-changing.

d4m_e2_acquisition_b.speaker: Corporate Buyer
d4m_e2_acquisition_b.text: Your team culture and customer loyalty make this acquisition extremely attractive. We're offering full market value plus 20%. This is a rare opportunity.

choices.text: Accept — a great offer is a great offer
Counter with a higher price
Decline — you built this, and you keep it
Ask for a management role in the acquisition

d4m_e2_accept.speaker: Corporate Buyer
d4m_e2_accept.text: Excellent decision. You've built something genuinely impressive here.

d4m_e2_counter.speaker: Corporate Buyer
d4m_e2_counter.text: Bold counter. We can meet you at 30% above market. Your confidence in your own value is well placed.

d4m_e2_decline.speaker: Corporate Buyer
d4m_e2_decline.text: We respect that. The offer stands open for 30 days. What you've built here is special — protect it well.

d4m_e2_manage.speaker: Corporate Buyer
d4m_e2_manage.text: A management role is actually appealing. We want your culture preserved. Let's structure this as an acqui-hire.

d4m_e2_result_accept.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e2_result_accept.text: Knowing when to exit is as important as knowing when to persist. A successful exit funds your next venture. This isn't failure — it's graduation.

d4m_e2_result_counter.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e2_result_counter.text: Negotiating an acquisition price upward shows confidence in your own value. Motivated teams and loyal customers are worth more than any spreadsheet shows.

d4m_e2_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e2_result_decline.text: Choosing independence over a lucrative offer takes real conviction. Make sure the decision is strategic, not just emotional.

d4m_e2_result_manage.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e2_result_manage.text: Creative deal structures often produce better outcomes than binary accept-or-reject decisions. Thinking beyond the standard offer shows business sophistication.

d4m_e3_community_impact.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e3_community_impact.text: Your success has ripple effects. The neighborhood association wants to recognize your laundromat's positive impact on the community.

d4m_e3_community_b.speaker: Community Leader
d4m_e3_community_b.text: Your laundromat has become more than a business — it's a community hub. People feel safe here. We want to present you with a Community Impact Award.

choices.text: Accept with gratitude
Share credit with your team
Use the moment to announce a community program

d4m_e3_accept.speaker: Community Leader
d4m_e3_accept.text: Thank you! Your laundromat has made a real difference here.

d4m_e3_credit.speaker: Staff
d4m_e3_credit.text: You're giving us credit? Best boss ever! This means so much.

d4m_e3_program.speaker: Community Leader
d4m_e3_program.text: A free laundry day for families in need? That's incredible. You're a true community partner.

d4m_e3_result_accept.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e3_result_accept.text: Accepting recognition graciously builds your reputation. Your success has created positive community impact — own it.

d4m_e3_result_credit.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e3_result_credit.text: Sharing credit builds loyalty. Your team will work even harder for a leader who lifts them up.

d4m_e3_result_program.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e3_result_program.text: Using recognition as a platform for more impact is leadership at its best. Success shared is success multiplied.

d4m_r_customer_appreciation.speaker: Regular Customer
d4m_r_customer_appreciation.text: I've been coming here for months, and I just wanted to say — this place has changed my weekly routine for the better. Thank you.

d4m_r_appreciation_b.speaker: You
d4m_r_appreciation_b.text: A heartfelt thank you from a loyal customer. How do you respond?

choices.text: Thank them sincerely and offer a loyalty reward
Thank them and ask for a review
Thank them warmly and move on

d4m_r_appreciation_reward.speaker: Customer
d4m_r_appreciation_reward.text: A loyalty reward? You really shouldn't have. I'll definitely keep coming back!

d4m_r_appreciation_review.speaker: Customer
d4m_r_appreciation_review.text: Of course! I'll leave a review right now. You deserve it.

d4m_r_appreciation_thank.speaker: Customer
d4m_r_appreciation_thank.text: You're welcome! Just wanted you to know how much we appreciate you.

d4m_r_appreciation_result_reward.speaker: Mentor
d4m_r_appreciation_result_reward.text: Rewarding loyalty strengthens it. Small gestures cost little but create customers for life.

d4m_r_appreciation_result_review.speaker: Mentor
d4m_r_appreciation_result_review.text: Asking for reviews from happy customers is smart reputation management. Leverage positive moments.

d4m_r_appreciation_result_thank.speaker: Mentor
d4m_r_appreciation_result_thank.text: Gratitude alone is powerful. Sometimes just saying thank you genuinely is enough.

d4m_r_media_coverage.speaker: Reporter
d4m_r_media_coverage.text: I'm from the local news. We've heard amazing things about your laundromat and want to do a segment on your success. Would you be open to an interview?

d4m_r_media_b.speaker: You
d4m_r_media_b.text: A news segment! How do you handle this opportunity?

choices.text: Accept immediately — free publicity!
Ask to review the segment before airing
Prepare talking points in advance

d4m_r_media_accept.speaker: Reporter
d4m_r_media_accept.text: Wonderful! We'll air the segment this Friday. This is going to be great for your business.

d4m_r_media_review.speaker: Reporter
d4m_r_media_review.text: Smart to ask. We're happy to share the draft before airing.

d4m_r_media_prepare.speaker: Reporter
d4m_r_media_prepare.text: Preparation shows professionalism. This will be a great segment.

d4m_r_media_result_accept.speaker: Mentor
d4m_r_media_result_accept.text: Seizing media opportunities builds your brand. Your success story deserves to be told.

d4m_r_media_result_review.speaker: Mentor
d4m_r_media_result_review.text: Review rights protect your brand. Never let others tell your story without your input.

d4m_r_media_result_prepare.speaker: Mentor
d4m_r_media_result_prepare.text: Preparation before interviews reduces risk and improves outcomes. Smart move.

d4m_r_industry_award.speaker: Association Rep
d4m_r_industry_award.text: Congratulations! Your laundromat has been nominated for the Industry Excellence Award.

d4m_r_award_b.speaker: You
d4m_r_award_b.text: Industry recognition! How do you respond?

choices.text: Accept with excitement
Ask about the selection process
Humbly say you're honored

d4m_r_award_accept.speaker: Association Rep
d4m_r_award_accept.text: Wonderful! We'll announce the winner at the ceremony next month.

d4m_r_award_ask.speaker: Association Rep
d4m_r_award_ask.text: Happy to explain. It's based on customer reviews, cleanliness, and community impact.

d4m_r_award_humble.speaker: Association Rep
d4m_r_award_humble.text: Humility is admirable. Your nomination is well deserved.

d4m_r_award_result_accept.speaker: Mentor
d4m_r_award_result_accept.text: Industry recognition validates your hard work. Accepting awards graciously signals confidence.

d4m_r_award_result_ask.speaker: Mentor
d4m_r_award_result_ask.text: Understanding the criteria helps you replicate success. Smart to ask.

d4m_r_award_result_humble.speaker: Mentor
d4m_r_award_result_humble.text: Humility is a virtue, but don't be afraid to stand in your success. You've earned it.

d4m_e5_momentum.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e5_momentum.text: What a day! Your team is buzzing. End of the day, and the energy is incredible.

d4m_e5_momentum_b.speaker: Staff
d4m_e5_momentum_b.text: Boss, we're all feeling it today. The team wants to do something special tomorrow to keep this energy going. What do you think we should focus on?

choices.text: Plan a customer appreciation event
Channel energy into process improvements
Document what's working to replicate it
Let the team choose — it's their energy

d4m_e5_event.speaker: Customer
d4m_e5_event.text: A customer appreciation event? This is why we love this place!

d4m_e5_process.speaker: Staff
d4m_e5_process.text: Using this energy to fix our processes is brilliant. We identified three inefficiencies today!

d4m_e5_document.speaker: Staff
d4m_e5_document.text: Writing down what makes today special is so smart. Now we have a blueprint.

d4m_e5_team_choice.speaker: Staff
d4m_e5_team_choice.text: You're giving us the decision? That means everything. We chose to reach out personally to our top 20 customers tomorrow.

d4m_e5_result_event.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e5_result_event.text: Converting internal momentum into customer experiences is powerful marketing. Your team's energy became a customer memory — that's priceless.

d4m_e5_result_process.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e5_result_process.text: Using peak performance moments to fix systems is genius. High-morale teams can tackle problems that feel impossible when spirits are low.

d4m_e5_result_document.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e5_result_document.text: Systematizing success is how businesses scale. Knowing what creates your best days means you can engineer more of them intentionally.

d4m_e5_result_team.speaker: Mentor
d4m_e5_result_team.text: Ultimate trust in your team creates ultimate ownership. When people choose the direction, they execute with a level of commitment that cannot be mandated.
